pageContext.name: Ghost Soldier (White)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and TBLeague are proud to present the iconic Ghost Soldier (White) Sixth Scale Figure!  The Ghost Soldier (White) comes equipped with a stunning set of white armor along with her shield and two short spears. With a seamless and posable body in highly detailed 1:6 scale form, she is ready to lead her troops into battle!  Add the Ghost Soldier (White) Sixth Scale Figure to your collection today!
